privileged_info_summary: The geocache route optimizer task is a medium-difficulty spreadsheet task with a 240-minute time budget to plan an efficient route through 10 geocaches in Rocky Mountain National Park. Starting from Visitor Center coordinates (40.3200, -105.6700), users must calculate time estimates using the formula 15 + (Difficulty-1)*5 + (Terrain-1)*8 minutes, distances using 110 * SQRT((Lat - 40.3200)^2 + (Lon - (-105.6700))^2), and travel time as distance * 2. There are 5 mandatory Priority 1 caches, 3 Priority 2 caches, and 2 Priority 3 caches. All cache data is synthetic (not from real geocaching.com), with difficulty and terrain scales ranging from 1-5. The task timeout is 300 seconds with maximum 50 steps.
